pi_items.source: task.json description line 5 and setup_task.sh wave 1 naming convention
Task description explicitly states 'DELETE the Baseline Demographics question group'. setup_task.sh line 76 creates this group with exact name.
Task description states 'KEEP the School Experience and Family Context groups exactly as they are'. setup_task.sh lines 78 and 80 create these groups with exact names.

setup_task.sh line 88 creates question with code 'gpa' in School Experience group. This question exists in Wave 1 and must be present in copied Wave 2. export_result.sh line 46 and verifier.py line 50 check for this question.
Task description line 5 states 'ADD a new question group named Recent Changes'. export_result.sh line 50 checks for this group.
Task description line 5 states 'add a Yes/No question with the code moved'. export_result.sh line 54 checks for question with title='moved'.
Task description specifies 'add a Yes/No question'. In LimeSurvey API, Yes/No question type is 'Y'. verifier.py line 67 checks if q_type == 'Y'. This is the standard LimeSurvey question type enum.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a Wave 2 survey in the 'Youth Development Study' by copying the existing Wave 1 survey in LimeSurvey. The Wave 2 survey must have the title 'Youth Development Study - Wave 2' and preserve the 'School Experience' and 'Family Context' question groups from Wave 1, including the 'gpa' question (numeric type). The 'Baseline Demographics' group from Wave 1 must be deleted. A new 'Recent Changes' question group must be added containing a Yes/No (type Y) question with code 'moved'. The survey must be activated. All data is synthetically created by the setup script using LimeSurvey's RPC API.
